name: ravenclaude-core
description: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialist-agents pattern for Claude Code: 14 specialists, 38 skills, a dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, hooks, rules, and templates. Includes the Capability Grounding Protocol (environment + decision-tree priors, alternate-methods enumeration, honest blocked-reporting), the Structured Output Protocol for handoffs, a Researcher meta-skill, a comfort-posture dashboard that writes Claude Code permission rules per layer, an opt-in command-review tribunal (the Thing), a WebFetch return-envelope sanitizer (webfetch-hardening + sanitize-webfetch-body.py) that strips injection-shaped blocks from fetched bodies, a sanctioned escape hatch (branch-archive + archive-branch.sh) for retiring stale branches without losing work, and brand-extraction (homepage → brand kit: every logo variant + a design-token schema for on-brand HTML reports). Slash commands: /init-agent-ready, /wrap, /set-posture, /dashboard.
